caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a grey suit jacket over a white shirt and a green tie, stands on a stage presenting at a conference. To his left, a large screen displays a dark blue slide with a network graphic. The screen contains the text "TODAY: INDUSTRY-READY ML", followed by a list: "Overview & caveats in scaling data pipelines", "Airflow components (Celery, ML models, etc)", "Introducing difference between ML & Data Pipelines", and "Overview of Airflow + Usecase". At the bottom of the slide, the phrase "THE BIG PICTURE" is written in bold. Below the screen, a white banner features the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his position slightly and gestures with his hands while speaking, though he remains in the same location on the stage.
